creator: greg.bal4@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Henrich Hartzer from comment #1)

The problem remains in 13.4-RELEASE.  This is a FreeBSD issue. All that needs to happen is to add alsa-plugins as a dependency to openscad.  Most people probably don't see this because if you install chromium (or something else that requires alsa-plugins) alsa-plugins gets installed as a dependency resulting in sounds working in openscad.
